what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record in the design-source channel that links an image asset (image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-47) to the ledger, recording only metadata: id, channel, attachment_type, target, and an added timestamp.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It has an id 'att-69d3c3c1' and channel 'design-source'.
The target is a URI-style reference 'image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-47'.
An ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone is provided in the 'added' field.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: It functions as a minimal stub that points to an external image asset via a custom URI scheme.
It records provenance metadata (when the attachment was added).
conventions: Uses a URI-style target to reference an asset rather than embedding it.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone.
concerns: The file contains no description or title for the image, so its content is opaque from this file alone.
The target URI cannot be resolved or validated without external context.
There is no recorded author or source for the attachment.
notes: A bare design-source image attachment stub that points to pitch image p-47 and records when it was added.
questions: What does the image at image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-47 depict?
Who added this attachment and why?
What is 'p-47' and how does it relate to other pitches?
How is the image:// URI resolved in this system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches what the file does; it is a minimal, functional stub.
intention_signals: To create a lightweight, timestamped ledger entry that associates an image asset with the design-source channel so it can be retrieved and contextualized alongside related design work.
novelty: Use of a custom 'image://' URI scheme to reference an external asset within a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a neutral, timestamped link between a channel and an external image asset, preserving attachment type and provenance without embedding the asset itself.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata stub for a design-source channel attachment that references the image asset image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-47 and records its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment in the design-source channel so it can be located and used in relation to design pitches.
